thesis_hint: Recent quality on the strongest active branch is still improving (VVV funding snapback QScore 0.0900 -> 0.3182 -> 0.5323), so exploration is allowed. Target BABY 1h because funding is extremely negative (-0.00381) with top non-BTC opportunity score, strong volume, and large open interest; build a liquidation-squeeze reclaim long that only activates after a downside flush, reclaim above a fast intraday trend anchor, and confirmation that funding remains deeply negative at entry.
